item.name: Ceremony Chocobo Whistle
item.description: A small hand-carved whistle that emits a unique, high-pitched tone discernible only by a ceremony chocobo trained from birth to recognize and respond to the sound. Use to summon your ceremony chocobo mount.

mount.name: Ceremony Chocobo
mount.action: Summon forth your ceremony chocobo, large enough to bear both you and your special someone.
mount.description: Raised by Ishgard's master breeders for beauty and purity of stock, its snow white feathers are natural and, though fully developed, as soft as down. Temperament-wise, the bird is remarkably docile and one of few breeds who will allow dual riders upon its back.
mount.tooltip:
Don't stand on ceremony,
tick-tock, tick-tock!
- Helmhart
